entries.statement: Skill in writing production-quality data transformation code in SQL and at least one general-purpose programming language (Python or Scala), including unit testing and documentation.
Skill in writing well-structured, tested, and documented SQL transformations that produce reliable, reusable datasets for analytics consumers.
Skill in translating business metric definitions from domain stakeholders into precise, unambiguous SQL logic with documented assumptions and edge case handling.

Skill in using Git for version control in data and AI projects, including branching, merging, pull request workflows, code review participation, and repository organization for multi-contributor teams.

Skill in writing automated tests for data applications, including unit tests for transformation logic, integration tests for pipeline components, and data validation tests using appropriate testing frameworks.
Skill in containerizing data and AI applications using Docker, including Dockerfile authoring, multi-stage builds, image size optimization, and container registry management.

Skill in provisioning and configuring cloud platform data services, including compute resources, managed databases, object storage, and analytics services, with attention to cost optimization and security configuration.
Skill in writing shell scripts to automate data operations, including file manipulation, job scheduling, environment configuration, log processing, and pipeline orchestration on Linux systems.

Skill in designing and implementing APIs for data services, including RESTful endpoint design, request and response formatting, error handling, authentication integration, and API documentation using OpenAPI or equivalent specifications.

Skill in analyzing and optimizing SQL query execution plans, identifying performance bottlenecks, and implementing indexing, partitioning, and query restructuring strategies to improve data retrieval performance.

Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architecture diagrams, API specifications, operational runbooks, data dictionaries, and troubleshooting guides that enable team independence.

Skill in debugging data applications across multiple system layers, tracing issues through application code, database queries, network connectivity, and infrastructure configuration to identify root causes.

Skill in designing and implementing continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines for data and AI applications, including automated testing, security scanning, and automated deployment strategies.

Skill in orchestrating containerized applications using container management platforms, including deploying and scaling multi-container applications, managing service networking, persistent storage, and resource allocation.

Skill in designing and maintaining automated data pipeline architectures that reliably process, transform, and deliver data at scale, including data quality validation, error handling, and recovery mechanisms.
Skill in implementing infrastructure-as-code practices for data and AI systems, using declarative configuration tools to provision, version, and manage cloud infrastructure reproducibly and reliably.

Skill in implementing system monitoring, logging, and observability solutions for data applications, including setting up metrics collection, log aggregation, alerting, and dashboards to track application health and performance.

Skill in implementing error handling, resilience patterns, and fault tolerance mechanisms in data applications, including designing retry logic, circuit breakers, graceful degradation, and recovery procedures.

Skill in designing and implementing data serialization and messaging systems for inter-service communication, including selecting appropriate formats and protocols for reliable data exchange in distributed systems.

Skill in managing and optimizing cloud storage solutions for data and AI applications, including designing storage architectures, implementing data lifecycle policies, optimizing for cost and performance, and ensuring data accessibility.
Skill in designing and executing security-focused tests for data applications, including identifying vulnerabilities, penetration testing, and compliance validation.
Skill in designing and conducting performance, load, and stress testing for data systems, including capacity planning, bottleneck identification, and scalability assessment.
Skill in designing normalized database schemas and data models that balance query performance, data integrity, and business requirements across different database systems.
Skill in documenting data system architectures including component design, integration points, deployment topology, and architecture decision records that guide system evolution.
Skill in writing operational procedures, runbooks, and standard operating procedures that enable teams to safely and consistently operate production data systems.
